title: Syrian-Style Fish Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy fish dish inspired by Syrian cuisine, perfect for a dinner meal. The combination of crispy fish and fresh herbs creates a delightful taste experience.
instructions: Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry.
In a bowl, mix together chopped cilantro, onion, Syrian red pepper flakes, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish fillets to the bowl and coat them evenly with the marinade.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the marinated fish fillets to the pan and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
